items.title: The four spaces a file moves through
items.mermaid:
flowchart LR WT["Working tree
(files on disk)"] IX["Index
(staging area)"] LR["Local repo
(commits)"] RR["Remote repo
(GitHub/GitLab)"] WT -- "git add" --> IX IX -- "git commit" --> LR LR -- "git push" --> RR RR -- "git pull / fetch" --> LR LR -- "git checkout / restore" --> WT
items.caption: A change only enters Git history once it's been committed. Until then it lives in the working tree (and maybe the index).

items.title: Commits as a DAG; branches as pointers
items.mermaid:
flowchart RL C1(("C1
a3f2…")) --> C2(("C2
8b41…")) C2 --> C3(("C3
d1ef…")) C2 --> C4(("C4
9aac…")) C4 --> C5(("C5
72bd…")) main(["main → C3"]) feat(["feature/auth → C5"]) HEAD(["HEAD → feature/auth"]) main -.points to.-> C3 feat -.points to.-> C5 HEAD -.symbolic.-> feat
items.caption: Commits form an immutable DAG (arrows point to *parents*). Branches and HEAD are lightweight movable pointers.
